case_title: KEVIN SCHWING VS. ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY SCHWING, KEVIN ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHWING, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,464.98 FILED BY SCHWING, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHWING, KEVIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHWING, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSSITER RELOCATION SERVICES, INC $2,724.98 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,790.98, *THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT IS LIABLE TO THE PLAINTIFF FOR THE LOST GOODS. BASED ON THE EVIDENCE THE COURT FINDS THE VALUE OF THE GOODS TO BE $2500.00. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF SHOULD RECEIVE $224.98 FOR DAMAGES TO THE GRILL. IF PLAINTIFF DEPOSITS CHECKS FROM THE DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNTS OF $224.98 AND $150.00, AND THE CHECKS CLEAR THE BANK, DEFENDANT SHALL BE GIVEN CREDIT ON THE JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF THE CHECKS THAT ARE PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-29-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)
